title: Suspension of Documentary Processing. The repatriation of seafarer,
content: 55 including the imposition of suspension of documentary processing of the erring LMA 56 and/or principal/employer, shall follow the procedure as may be prescribed in the 57 guidelines to be issued by the Department. 58 59 55
